eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Yavapai, AZ; at 3:44 PM on JUL 4, 2026 Effective until 3:44 PM JUL 5, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Yavapai Sheriff Alert: 07/04/2026 3:41PM WILDFIRE near YARNELL. This is a GO Order for YCU-2408 & YCU-2414. EVACUATE NOW TOWARDS PRESCOTT.
